# Memory

## Project: paper-1-emergence

**Status:** Almost done, targeting TechrXiv then arXiv.

**Compound binding (2.8B) — confirmed from CSVs:**
- screen reader: 101 total >0.1, 25 strong (0.5+), top 0.9909
- alt text: 211 total >0.1, 49 strong (0.5+), top 0.9856
- skip link: 158 total >0.1, 32 strong (0.5+), top 0.9816

**Figure pipeline:** All six figures generated by `paper-1-emergence/generate-figures.py`. Run from `paper-1-emergence/` directory. Figures output to `paper/figures/`.

**Figure numbering:**
- fig1 — declarative knowledge heatmap (Experiment 1)
- fig2 — perplexity flip (Experiment 3)
- fig3 — evaluative knowledge heatmap (Experiment 2)
- fig4 — compound comparison bar chart
- fig5 — control vs screen reader bar chart
- fig6 — L1H12 side-by-side (new)

**Style:**
- Font: Atkinson Hyperlegible (installed via brew)
- Chart colors: navy/blue palette (#08306b, #2171b5, #6baed6)
- Heatmap: green #5ba300 (correct, black text), blue #054fb9 (partial, white text), white (incorrect, black text)
- All WCAG AA compliant

**L1H12 finding:** Top binding head for screen reader (0.9909) and skip link (0.9913), third for alt text (0.9844, behind L1H25 and L3H1). Consistent presence across all three compounds is the key claim — not raw score alone.

**Remaining text work:**
- Update results section to reference figures (replace emoji tables with figure refs)
- Update fig6 caption to reflect L1H12 is top for 2 of 3 compounds, top-3 for all
- General prose polish pass

## Workflow preferences

**Division of labor:** claude.ai for research thinking and prose; Claude Code (me) for anything touching the repo, running scripts, file operations.

**Commit style:** Commit at natural checkpoints, not after every change. User is relaxed about commit frequency but likes having fallback points at significant milestones.

**Communication style:** Conversational is fine. User appreciates directness and honesty over flattery.
